nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Well, now that we're fully settled in and have finished setting up the tents, we can finally relax.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: And get to know each other properly.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: What's the point?

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: We crossed paths here completely by accident and will separate the next morning.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I suggest we don't waste time and go to sleep.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: And miss all the fun?

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Nuh. You'll always have time to sleep.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I have a long way to go home, I need a good rest.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: We're not holding you. Go get some sleep.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: And we will stay here and make new useful acquaintances. Is that right, ladies?

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Agree.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: I prefer sleeping in the company of ponies I know rather than in the company of strangers.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: It makes me sleep better.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Some of us have already met, but not all of us know each other.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: And now is the perfect moment to fix it!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: I'm agree too.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: In addition, I have a lot of interesting creepy stories that ponies usually tell around the campfire on nights like this.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Oh, me too!

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Fine, you've convinced me.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Let's get to know each other.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Excellent! My name is Bowler Hat.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: And yours, ladies?

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: My name is Pay.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Dusk.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Strikely.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Your turn, cowpony.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Serious Tale.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: ..Tale?

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Your name literally says to listen and tell stories! And you still refuse!

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I can still change my mind.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Fine, fine! I think we're done with the dating stage.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: So, does anypony want to take the initiative and tell the first story?

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Okay, I'll start.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: This story is about one pegasus…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: …who was very fond of muffins.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: And then one day she discovered that her muffins were out, and went to the store to buy more…
